# Provenance Detection Patterns

## Sourcemap Indicators
- *.js.map, *.css.map files present
- sourceMappingURL= comment in output files
- If source files (TS/Sass) absent -> derived from external source

## Generated Code Markers
- "DO NOT EDIT" header comments
- "@generated" annotations
- Timestamp comments: "Generated on 2024-..."
- "codegen" or "autogenerated" in file path
- Uniform formatting across many files (same structure, different data)

## Decompiled Code Indicators
- Variable names: var1, var2, _0x3a2f (hex/mangled)
- Single-letter variable names throughout
- All code in one line or uniform formatting
- Absence of comments, whitespace, and readable structure
- try/catch around every statement

## Build Artifact Indicators
- Files in dist/, build/, out/, target/ directories
- Minified: single line, no whitespace
- Bundled: multiple modules concatenated
- Hashed filenames: main.a3f2b1.js

## Source of Truth Signals
- Has git history with meaningful commits
- Has tests alongside source
- Has documentation and comments
- Variable names are descriptive
- Code follows project conventions
